analysis_commentary: Catastrophic regression: candidate max_prob reached 1.0 by probe 11 (t=178s) and stayed pinned through all remaining candidate probes; legal_mass_sum=0 throughout. Critically, 0 arenas fired (interval=600 vs 600s training window), so arena promotion is definitively ruled out as the collapse driver. The bare entropy=0.003 basin is apparently seed-sensitive — this is the same parameters as the accepted current best, just a different initialization.
